creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
From <https://cgit.freebsd.org/doc/commit/access?h=internal/admin&id=c972c83db9c2a07f3365787d2671ee4e510ec89c> (2015): 

# Please try to keep the handbook (share/xml/authors.ent
# en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/contributors/contrib.committers.xml)
# in sync with this.

I can't find either of these paths: 

    share/xml/authors.ent

    en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/contributors/contrib.committers.xml

Instead of the latter, maybe this: 

    <https://cgit.freebsd.org/doc/tree/shared/contrib-committers.adoc>

Source for <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/articles/contributors/#staff-committers> does include: 

    :include-contrib-committers: shared/contrib-committers.adoc

----

Sorry, I can't tell how best to categorise this report.
